cards.back: The Kleene star closure of a language L is closed under termination if for any string w and any string x in L, the concatenation of w with x is also in the Kleene star closure of L.
The Kleene star closure of a language L is closed under union, concatenation, and Kleene star, but not necessarily under complement.
Two automata A1 and A2 are equivalent if for any string w, w is accepted by A1 if and only if w is accepted by A2.
Minimizing an automaton A means constructing an equivalent automaton A' with the fewest possible states.
Regular expression minimization is the process of finding the smallest equivalent regular expression for a given set of regular expressions.
